brand.tagline: by Atmart · thinking in the age of AI
hero.kicker: Don't compete with AI. Don't ignore it.
hero.title: Think and create in the age of AI.
hero.lead: Lojik360 helps you thrive with artificial intelligence: delegate what it does well, supervise what it does poorly, and strengthen what stays deeply human — free, in 4 languages.
man.title: The manifesto
man.p1: Artificial intelligence and robotics are advancing fast, but it would be unwise to treat the disappearance of almost all jobs as certain. Recent research points above all to an uneven transformation of tasks, skills and the way work is organized.
man.p2: The International Labour Organization estimates that about one job in four is potentially exposed to generative AI, while judging transformation more likely than full replacement. The Future of Jobs Report 2025 anticipates 170 million jobs created and 92 million eliminated by 2030. These figures are not certainties: creation, displacement and reskilling can happen at the same time.
man.idea: Don't try to beat AI at its own speed, and don't ignore it. Learn to hand it what it does well, to check what it does imperfectly, and to strengthen what demands context, relationship, responsibility, creativity and judgment.
man.sources: Sources: International Labour Organization (ILO); World Economic Forum, Future of Jobs Report 2025.
ax.title: Three ways to thrive with AI
ax.a1_desc: Hand AI what it does well: draft text, automate repetitive tasks, explore data. You learn to steer it (prompting) and pick the right tools.
ax.a2_desc: Control what it does imperfectly: check its answers, spot errors and bias, trace the sources. This is the heart of critical thinking.
ax.a3_desc: Grow what AI doesn't replace: judgment, creativity, communication, the ability to lead and create, relationship and responsibility.
pod.title: 🎙 Lojik360 — the podcast
pod.desc: Every week, a real topic broken down to help you think and decide better in the age of AI.
nl.title: 📬 Stay connected
nl.desc: Get the new episode, a tutorial and an activity every week. Zero spam.

k.title: Lojikkid — learning made fun.
k.lead: Free, fun activities for kids: make things with your hands, think for yourself, explore the digital world and understand money.
k.parents: : simple, safe activities that work without a screen.
k.cta_desc: New free activities to learn, create and grow.
k.c1_desc: Bring your ideas to life: drawing, music, little games to code, gardening, building.
k.c1_a1: Draw your imaginary animal and invent its story.
k.c1_a2: Build a musical instrument from things around the house.
k.c1_a3: Plant a seed and note what changes each day.
k.c2_desc: Ask good questions, tell true from false, don't believe everything.
k.c2_a1: Before sharing news, ask: 'how do we know?'
k.c2_a2: Find three reasons for and three against an idea.
k.c2_a3: Spot an advert and say what it wants you to do.
k.c3_desc: Use a computer or tablet safely, find good information, read a simple chart.
k.c3_a1: Count how many friends like each ice-cream flavour, then make a little chart.
k.c3_a2: Find who wrote a web page before believing it.
k.c3_a3: Sort your toys into groups — that's organising data!
k.c4_desc: Saving, making a small budget, solving everyday problems.
k.c4_a1: Save one coin a day and count at the end of the week.
k.c4_a2: Make the shopping list and guess the total before paying.
k.c4_a3: Choose between two wishes: which one lasts longer?
tut.title: Free tutorials, organized by the 3 axes
tut.lead: Learn to thrive with AI: delegate, supervise, and strengthen what stays human. Pick a topic and start — it's free.
tut.h_mgmt: Management & career in the age of AI
tut.kids_d: Free, fun activities for children: create, think clearly, digital & data, money & life skills.
k.areas_sub: Pick a subject. Inside, the skills go from the simplest to the most advanced.
tut.a_del_d: Map the work, prompt well, verify AI outputs, protect data, automate safely. Every session produces a real artifact.
tut.a_sup: Managing the AI transformation — 9 action sessions
tut.a_sup_d: Usage doctrine, limited pilots, human-in-the-loop control, risk and ethics, leading change. Every session produces a real artifact.
tut.a_hum_d: Judgment, communication, trust, creativity under constraints, attention, health and career resilience. Every session produces a real artifact.
tut.facil_t: 👩‍🏫 Facilitating a group? The facilitator guide
tut.facil_d: The 27 action sessions, facilitator edition: opening moves, guided action support, debrief questions and artifact review criteria — aligned to the 3 axes.
tut.d_prompt_d: Write good prompts, iterate, verify answers, protect your data and build your own templates. Every session produces a real deliverable.
tut.d_excelia: Excel in the AI era — 12 action sessions
tut.d_excelia_d: Tables, formulas, charts, pivot tables, Power Query, scenarios and finance — with AI prompts and human verification at every step.
